category_sources: source_facts.description says interactive network connection monitor; official GitHub README at https://github.com/taylorwilsdon/netshow describes process-aware network monitoring.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is netshow; official GitHub README heading uses netshow.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README documents quickstart, usage, options, keybindings, and features.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository and the source archive comes from the same project release.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics include networking, tcp, terminal-app, lsof, psutil, netmon; source_facts.executables contains netshow.
